reforms.description: A law concerning granting of loans to firms on employment policy grounds has entered into force, requiring firms to keep workers employed or in training to qualify for loans.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: This reform supports employment maintenance, which can enhance productivity and economic stability.
reforms.status_evidence: Law concerning granting of loans to firms on employment policy grounds enters into force.
reforms.importance_rationale: The reform introduces a new mechanism for supporting employment, which is significant for firms but not a comprehensive overhaul of the system.
reforms.source_quote: Law concerning granting of loans to firms on employment policy grounds enters into force.
